caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is positioned centrally against a solid dark gray background, appearing to speak and gesture with her hands. She wears a light green tunic with small red and pink floral embroidery along the neckline and a simple dark necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a small logo featuring a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL" is visible. As the sequence progresses, the woman continues speaking, her mouth opening and closing in synchronization with her speech. Her hands move dynamically in front of her chest, shifting positions as she emphasizes points with her gestures. The camera remains static, keeping the woman in a medium close-up shot throughout the duration of the clip.
